      • validateOptions(opts: BatchFilterOptions)
      • validateOptions(opts: SampleSheetOptions)

Imports

fastq_filter

Types

BatchFilterOptions = object
  sampleThreads*: int
  parallelMinSamples*: int
  continueOnError*: bool
  verbose*: bool
BatchPairedFilterResult = object
  samples*: seq[PairedSampleResult]
  totals*: FastqPairedFilterStats
  failedSamples*: int
PairedSampleInput = object
  sampleId*: string
  readsForward*: string
  readsReverse*: string
PairedSampleJob = object
  sampleId*: string
  readsForward*: string
  readsReverse*: string
  outForward*: string
  outReverse*: string
PairedSampleResult = object
  sampleId*: string
  job*: PairedSampleJob
  success*: bool
  errorMessage*: string
  stats*: FastqPairedFilterStats
SampleSheetOptions = object
  delimiter*: char
  hasHeader*: bool
  sampleIdColumn*: string
  forwardColumn*: string
  reverseColumn*: string

Procs

proc buildPairedJobs(samples: openArray[PairedSampleInput]; outputDir: string;
                     outForwardSuffix = "_R1.filtered.fastq.gz";
                     outReverseSuffix = "_R2.filtered.fastq.gz"): seq[
    PairedSampleJob] {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc defaultBatchFilterOptions(): BatchFilterOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc defaultSampleSheetOptions(): SampleSheetOptions {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc deriveSampleIdFromForward(forwardPath: string; r1Token = "_R1"): string {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc discoverPairedSamples(inputDir: string; r1Token = "_R1"; r2Token = "_R2";
                           recursive = false; requireMate = true): seq[
    PairedSampleInput] {....raises: [IOError, ValueError, OSError],
                         tags: [ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
proc fastqExt(path: string): bool {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc filterAndTrimPaired(jobs: openArray[PairedSampleJob];
                         filterOpts: PairedFastqFilterOptions;
                         batchOpts = defaultBatchFilterOptions()): BatchPairedFilterResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, IOError, IOError, ValueError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect, WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc filterAndTrimPaired(samples: openArray[PairedSampleInput];
                         outputDir: string;
                         filterOpts: PairedFastqFilterOptions;
                         batchOpts = defaultBatchFilterOptions();
                         outForwardSuffix = "_R1.filtered.fastq.gz";
                         outReverseSuffix = "_R2.filtered.fastq.gz"): BatchPairedFilterResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, IOError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect, WriteDirEffect, ReadDirEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc filterAndTrimPairedDir(inputDir: string; outputDir: string;
                            filterOpts: PairedFastqFilterOptions;
                            batchOpts = defaultBatchFilterOptions();
                            r1Token = "_R1"; r2Token = "_R2"; recursive = false;
                            outForwardSuffix = "_R1.filtered.fastq.gz";
                            outReverseSuffix = "_R2.filtered.fastq.gz"): BatchPairedFilterResult {.
    ...raises: [IOError, ValueError, OSError],
    tags: [ReadDirEffect, WriteIOEffect, WriteDirEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc filterAndTrimPairedSheet(sheetPath: string; outputDir: string;
                              filterOpts: PairedFastqFilterOptions;
                              sheetOpts = defaultSampleSheetOptions();
                              batchOpts = defaultBatchFilterOptions();
                              outForwardSuffix = "_R1.filtered.fastq.gz";
                              outReverseSuffix = "_R2.filtered.fastq.gz"): BatchPairedFilterResult {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, IOError, CsvError, OSError, KeyError], tags: [
    ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect, WriteDirEffect, TimeEffect],
    forbids: [].}
proc readPairedSampleSheet(sheetPath: string; opts = defaultSampleSheetOptions()): seq[
    PairedSampleInput] {....raises: [ValueError, IOError, CsvError, OSError,
                                  KeyError],
                         tags: [ReadDirEffect, ReadIOEffect, WriteIOEffect],
                         forbids: [].}
proc sanitizeSampleId(sampleId: string): string {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: BatchFilterOptions) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc validateOptions(opts: SampleSheetOptions) {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
